values.label: Source packet
values.description: Raw input unit before editorial normalization.

values.label: Source reference
values.description: Verifiable reference to an origin source.

values.label: Evidence item
values.description: Specific extracted claim, observation, or signal backed by a source.

values.label: Editorial entity
values.description: Reusable niche entity compatible with the entity schema.

values.label: Editorial requirement
values.description: Requirement extracted from a spreadsheet, brief, or editorial instruction.

values.label: Content block
values.description: Normalized editorial block used for planning or writing context.

values.label: Skeleton decision
values.description: Structural decision made while preparing a skeleton.

values.label: Freshness signal
values.description: Current external or recent signal that may update editorial context.

values.label: Reusable note
values.description: Stable editorial knowledge preserved for reuse.

values.label: Audit log
values.description: Minimal transformation trail for review and traceability.
